title: Japanese-Style Cottage Cheese Pilaf
description: A fusion of Japanese and Western flavors, this cottage cheese pilaf is a simple and satisfying side dish. The crunchy texture of toasted seeds adds a delightful contrast to the creamy cheese.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add sesame seeds and toast until lightly browned.
Add pilaf rice and stir to coat with sesame oil.
Add cottage cheese and stir until well combined.
Add soy sauce and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
Serve hot and garnish with additional sesame seeds if desired.
